questions.question: What is the difference between an aspirational rule and an operational rule?
questions.questionZh: 期望型规则 (aspirational rule) 与操作型规则 (operational rule) 之间有什么区别？
options: Aspirational rules are paid; operational rules are free
Aspirational rules have no check ('be careful'); operational rules carry a machine-checkable function the workbench can run
optionsZh: 愿景型规则需付费，实操型规则免费
期望型规则 (Aspirational rules) 不具备校验机制（仅提示“请小心”）；操作性规则 (Operational rules) 则包含机器可校验的函数，可由工作台 (workbench) 运行。
操作规则 (Operational rules) 更为详细
愿景型规则 (Aspirational rules) 需要管理器 (Manager)。
questions.explanation: Operational rules are testable; aspirational rules are wishes.
questions.explanationZh: 操作性规则（Operational rules）是可测试的；愿景型规则（Aspirational rules）仅是愿望。

questions.question: What five categories does the lesson cover most rules with?
questions.questionZh: 本课涵盖的大多数规则主要分为哪五个类别？
options: Startup, forbidden, definition of done, uncertainty, approval
optionsZh: 启动 (Startup), 禁止 (Forbidden), 完成定义 (Definition of Done), 不确定性 (Uncertainty), 审批 (Approval)
读取 (Read)、写入 (Write)、执行 (Exec)、派生 (Fork)、退出 (Exit)
规划、执行、复盘、优化、发布
低 (Low)、中 (Medium)、高 (High)、严重 (Critical)、致命 (Fatal)
questions.explanation: Startup, forbidden, definition of done, uncertainty handling, approval boundaries are the five.
questions.explanationZh: 这五项分别为：启动 (Startup)、禁止 (Forbidden)、完成定义 (Definition of Done)、不确定性处理 (Uncertainty Handling) 与审批边界 (Approval Boundaries)。

questions.question: Which severity tag stops execution and requires an operator override?
questions.questionZh: 哪种严重性标签（severity tag）会停止执行，且需要操作员手动覆盖（operator override）？
optionsZh: info
warn
block
soft
questions.explanation: block is the hard fail; warn annotates; info reports.
questions.explanationZh: block 表示硬性失败（hard fail，直接中断流程）；warn 表示添加警告标注；info 表示记录信息报告。

questions.question: Why does the lesson recommend tagging severity at write time?
questions.questionZh: 为什么本课程建议在写入时标记严重性（Severity）？
options: Teams overstate severity early and weaken it under deadline pressure; writing severity up front forces the calibration
optionsZh: 在 Markdown 中显示效果更佳。
团队在初期往往会夸大问题的严重程度（Severity），而在交付期限的压力下又会降低其评级；提前书面明确严重程度，能够强制进行校准（Calibration）。
代码检查工具 (Linters) 需要它。
它可以节省词元 (token)
questions.explanation: Severity calibration must be deliberate, not retrofitted under pressure.
questions.explanationZh: 严重性校准（Severity Calibration）必须经过周密规划，而非在压力下事后强行调整。

questions.question: What does the markdown-as-source, JSON-as-cache pattern do?
questions.questionZh: “以 Markdown 为源、JSON 为缓存”模式（Markdown-as-source, JSON-as-cache pattern）的作用是什么？
options: agent-rules.md is the authored file; agent-rules.lock.json is a hot-path cache regenerated by a pre-commit hook (same shape as package.json + lock)
optionsZh: 替换 Markdown
agent-rules.md 是人工编写的主文件；agent-rules.lock.json 是由预提交钩子（pre-commit hook）重新生成的热路径缓存（hot-path cache），其数据结构与 package.json 及其锁文件（lock file）保持一致。
加密规则
禁用审查
questions.explanation: Markdown stays reviewable; JSON parsing stays out of the hot path.
questions.explanationZh: Markdown 保持易于审查；JSON 解析则避开热路径 (hot path)。

questions.question: What is rule expiry as a forcing function?
questions.questionZh: 什么是将规则过期 (rule expiry) 作为强制机制 (forcing function)？
options: Each rule carries an expires_at (default 90 days); unfired rules trigger a quarterly review to justify, weaken, or delete them
Rules expire when the cache is full
Rules expire automatically; no review needed
optionsZh: 超过24小时的规则默认故障关闭（fail closed）
每条规则均包含 `expires_at` 字段（默认 90 天）；未触发的规则将触发季度审查，以论证其保留必要性、决定是否放宽限制或予以删除。
当缓存 (Cache) 已满时，规则 (Rules) 将过期。
规则自动过期，无需审核。
questions.explanation: Cloudflare's data showed sets with expiry stayed under 30 rules; sets without grew to 80+ unused.
questions.explanationZh: Cloudflare 的数据显示，设置了过期时间（expiry）的规则集（sets）始终保持在 30 条规则（rules）以内；而未设置过期时间的规则集则增长至 80 多条未使用（unused）的规则。

questions.question: How do rules relate to framework guardrails?
questions.questionZh: 规则与框架护栏（framework guardrails）之间有何关联？
options: Guardrails enforce rules at runtime; the rule set is the human-readable contract those guardrails implement
Guardrails are an alternative to rules
Only one of them is required
optionsZh: 规则 (Rules) 取代 护栏 (Guardrails)
护栏（Guardrails）在运行时强制执行规则；规则集（Rule Set）即为这些护栏所实现的人类可读契约。
护栏（Guardrails）是规则（Rules）的替代方案。
只需提供其中一项即可
questions.explanation: Both are needed: runtime catches violations; rule set proves the runtime is doing the right thing.
questions.explanationZh: 两者缺一不可：运行时（runtime）负责捕获违规行为；规则集（rule set）则用于验证运行时是否在执行正确的操作。
